upasarga_meanings.meaning: utKanana karanA KodanA jamIna meM gaQQA banAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kftsnAM pfTivImanugacCata protKanaDvaM prayatnena yAvatturagadarSanam' (rA॰1.40.14) utKanatItyUrDvaM KanatItyAha praSabda utKananaM viSinazwi
'yatte BUme viKanAmi kzipraM tadapi rohatu' (aTarva0 12135) viKanAmi=utKanAmi
ANpUrvaH KanatirantarvidAraRe vartate yaTA''Kurityatra yaTA vA''Kara ityatra
'gAQaM niKAta iva me hfdaye kawAkzaH' (mAlatI0 129) ukto'rTaH
'imAM mahIM parito niKanadBiH' (sagarAtmajEH) (BA0 pu0 51929) niKanadBiH utKanadBiH yaTAnyatra taTAtrApyasTAna upasargaprayogaH kaveH
'yAvataH kurute jantuH sambanDAnAtmanaH priyAn tAvanto'sya niKanyante hfdaye SokaSaNkavaH' (hitopa0 469).. niKanyante nimIyante nihanyante
'utKAtalavaRo maDureSvaraH prAptaH' (uttara0 7) utKAto'DikArAtpracyAvito'varopitaH utKAtakeliH SfNgAdyErvaprakrIqA nigadyate utKAtamutKananam
'kaRwakikzIriRastu samUlAn pariKAyodvAsayet' (ASva0 gf0 265) pariKAya parita utKAya paritaH KananenotpAwyetyarTaH
